titleStmt.title: SII 9.68: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 68. (A.R. No. 383 of 1904.) ON THE FOUR FACES OF A PILLAR SET UP IN THE COURT-YARD OF THE RAMALINGESVARA TEMPLE AT RAMESVARA NEAR PRODDATURU, PRODDATURU TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: The inscription is damaged and not dated. It belongs to the reign of the Rāshṭrakūṭa king Kṛishṇa III and records the gift of some land and taxes to the Rāmēśvara temple by Kannayya, the king's Sāmanta and some land to Tippayya-Gorava. It consists of about 25 Sanskrit verses giving the genealogy of the Rāshsṭrakūṭa kings and praising Kṛishṇa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmānmānasamānidhāya vidhivaddhṛtpadmasanmadhya
mē chityā klēśakapāśarāśimaniśaṁ pā
rē tamassaṁsthitaṁ . rudhvā mārutamāmanaṁ
ti munayassaṁsāravicchittayē yaṁ
śrīdhuradaṁkakāranṛpatiṁ rāmēśvarō
rakṣatu . 1 . Asti brahmā tatōtrē(tri)ra trē
ranu nayanataścēndurindōrbudhōbhū
jjātassōmānvayānāṁ prathamanarapati
stasya dīrgghāyurasmāt . jātōsau bhū
mipēndrō yaduriti kukurō vṛṣṭirasyāpi
jātaśśrīvāsudēvastadanu ratipatista
tsutaścāniruddhaḥ . 2 . Ēvaṁ vaṁśē yadūnāṁ
rativisaradvikramaikāśrayāṇāṁ bhū
pā bhōgīndradīrghasthirabhujaparigha
kṣitōrvvīṁ vivaśāṁ sahāyyaṁ yaiḥprayā
suraripusamitau śrīmadākhaṇḍaḷasya . tē
naikēnēkavṛtyā śaśiviśadayaśōrāśaya
skā babhūvuḥ . 3 . tasminkuḷē sakaḷavāridhicāru
vīcī . kāmcībhṛtau mahitabhūmima
hāmahiṣya . bharttābhavannṛpasahasra
kamauḷimānyaṁ śrīrāṣṭrakūṭa Iti nāma nijandadhānāḥ [. 4 .*]
tatrānvayēpyabhavadēkapatiḥ pṛthivyāṁ śrīdantidurga Iti
durddharabāhuvīryyō . cāḷukya sindhumathanōdbhavarāja
lakṣmīṁ . yassaṁbabhāra ciramātmakuḷaikakāntāṁ . 5 .
tasminsāhasatuṁganāmni nṛpatau svassundarīprārtthi
tē . yātē yūni divandivākarasamaṁ vēśyēva lakṣmīsta
taḥ . tatrāvāpa bhujadvayēna nibiḍaṁ sāśliṣya ramyairgu
ṇaiḥ prītyā prāṇasamaṁ ciraṁ ramayati śrīkṛṣṇarājādhi
paṁ . 6 . tasmādabhūtsūnurudārakīrtiḥ prabhūtavarṣō bhu
vamāsa(śa)śāsa . yatsēnānīndramadamardanādgaṅgō
yō yāmunivadvibhāti . 7 . ratipatiruru
bhāvē darśatā(nā)tsuṁdarīṇāṁ . surata
dhattē tatra bhūpēnujēsya . dhruva Iti nṛpatitvē
maṁtṛbhiścābhiṣiktē . nirupama Iti bhūmau ma
budhōpi . 8 . tuṁgāsvayōttuṁgajayadhvajēna
jagattuṁga Iti kṣitīndraḥ Some lines seem to have been lost after this.

sarvajñō yindrānuja yēṣa sākṣā
gadrahō hantumihāvatīrṇnaḥ
ṣṇassukṛṣṇīkṛtavairinārī
nanēndranṛpatistatōbhūt . 1[2 .]
rājamārttāṁḍanṛpapratāpa
stamādāya jagajjigīṣuḥ
pasantāpitapāṇḍyarājō
vassamastāritamaḥ kṣa
yōbhūt . 13 . trinētrāmśasya
ryyathārhaṁ yathā prajā
bhūtaḷēpi . vidhātuma
tathēti gatvā kaḷāvatī
stanayōsya jātaḥ . 14 .
sya mayātmajēna vihi
rājñā pitō
tatsutēna hi mayātra
jagadrakṣaṇaṁ . Ityēvaṁ khalu kriṣṇa
nāma nṛpatiścēndrātmaja pra
śrīmānēṣa kaḷau kaḷaṁkarahitaḥ
pṛthvīmimāṁ rakṣati . 16 . ta
smin śrīdhuradaṁkakāranṛpatau
rakṣati kṣmāmimāṁ satyatyāga
samṛddha mahimā bha
baddhānyathā . jātō rakṣati
sāpradā vasumatī sasyauka
śasyōjvaḷā parjjanyōma
rmmāyavaniṁcāvatya sau
padaṁ . Āyōdhanārtthamadhiga
cchati kṛṣṇarājē kṛṣṇībabhū
va vadanaṁ ripukāminīnāṁ vai
dhavyatāpaparitāpitamā
nasānāṁ mattēbha kuṁ
bha prapēdē .

nābhaṁ tatra niyacchati dvijavarā dhanyāHere five lines are effaced.
vadānyastathā . jātāstēpi nidhīśvarāhṛ
rada grāmēśvarassōmahaḥ baṁdhu ścātma
samastathēṣṭasamadṛgbhṛtyāstathā jñāta
yaḥ sākṣādēva kṛtādhipatyama
tha yaḥ kṛṣṇē mahēndrātmajē . bhaktiḥ
śūḷini vallabhairvvasumatī vaśca vi
ttē ratāḥ kāryyaśśatruṣu baṁdhuṣu pratipa
daṁ snēhastatō praśrayaḥ . dānaṁ cā rtthiṣu duḥ
khitēṣu karuṇā durṇiṣṭēṣu daṇḍaṁ ciraṁ
saubhāgyaṁ vanitāsu kṛṣṇanṛpatē sa
rvvatra sarvārtthadaṁ . 20 . śrīraṭṭakandarpa
nṛpēṇa tēnāciraprabhuktaṁ draviḍaiḥ dri
yāyāḥ kāṁcyāspadē dakṣiṇadigramaṇyāḥ
kartuṁ ratiṁ daṇḍapatiṟprayuktaḥ . 21 .
jyabhāvē nṛpatiḥ prayuktaḥ kṛṣṇaścaveṇnā
dabhūmibhūṣāḥ . mahāśramābhāravarē
ṇa tēna kṛtāstayēbhranllihamūrttayastē
hēḷāvidhi racitānayatnai rāvatā
nārhamimēna yānti mahēśvarasyāla
yapantayastāstathāpi kailāsagirēryya
kaḥ yāvadpadmabhavō bhuvaṁ vitanutē yā
vacca lakṣmīpatiḥ dhattē vakṣasi kaustubhaṁ
sa bhagavāngaurīnadīrāḍvarō yāvacca
dhi ca hunivahairā bhū
vadhūstāvat śrīdhuradankakāranṛpa
tērddharmmatrayaṁ tiṣṭatu . 24 ..
svasti samadhigatapañcamahāśa
bda mahāsāmantaṁ sahajabhūri
śravaṁ trahara yā yā vara
śrīmat kannayyaṁ śrī gōyindara
hma yaṁ paḍedu rāmēśvara
koṭṭudu naṅgadūru Alliṁda
mūḍaṇa masiyaṅkadhavaḷargge A
mattarkkeyyi ndu keyyalu

kāḷadēvargge Ayvattu matta
rnnavilu saṁmaṁdha kammaṁ
Intinitumallade Ūṟiṁ pa
laṁ keya
ge masiyaṅkadhavaḷara ma
ttakke nilābhāgamāge na
ḍevudu Antu siddhā
yamumaṁ vara
gadyāṇa ponnu Intī sthiti
tappidoṁ śrīparvatamumaṁ
vāraṇāsiyumaṁ kavileyu
manaḻida pāpaṁ sārgguṁ ©
sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnnṛ
pāṇāṁ kālē kālē pā
lanīyō bhavadbhiḥ tasmādē
tāṁ bhāginaḥ pārtthivēndrō bhū
yō bhūyō yācatē rā
mabhadraḥ . bidirara keyyo
ttige tippayyagoravargge
mūvattu mattarkkeyyumaṁ makka
ḷa makkaḷge siṣyara siṣyari
ge naḍeyisuvudu tappalā
gadu .
Digital edition of SII 9.68 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
